title: How to share externally an embed Table view from a Document?
excerpt:

posts.author: nicogale (Niccolo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey folks, I need some help in case I’m missing something:

  • when developing a project brief in Monday I use the document to share it with the client (external share, no account needed) so that they can have visibility on the brief)
  • In the brief I usually integrate/embed the table view and gantt view of the workback schedule for the project

When sharing it externally the table and gantt view are locked because those cannot be shared externally, is there a way to share them inside the document instead of sharing them separately?

Let me know if you need more info, hoping to find a solution (or workaround)
Thanks!

posts.author: ZakiImtiaz (Zaki | readylogic.co)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @nicogale ,
To share the table and Gantt view within the document, export them as static files (PDF or images) and embed them in the document.
Alternatively, create a public dashboard with the Table and Gantt widgets, share its link, and embed it in the document for live updates.

Zaki
Business Workflow Consultant
Ready Logic
